title: Kubemc Productions April Fools Mod
description: A mod made for April Fools by the Kubemc team
body:
This Mod currently adds the following features with the goal of making minecraft more funny and providing possibilities to troll:


- The Battlespoon which is used to smack your enemies, crafted with iron and some iron trapdoors
- Craftable bedrock that can be broken, used for trolling your friends, crafted with stone and some dye
- Some sounds from the beta of minecraft, because they sound funnier

If you have bugs or need help, join my Discord: https://discord.gg/5sZ6mjReS9




If you need a server to play with friends, we are partnered with bisect hosting, which is a great high quality hosting service, if you are interested, use this link to support us: https://bisecthosting.com/kubemc

You can also use Code kubemc to get 25 percent off your first month.
